---
title: Oliver Hannaoui
---

Greetings! I am a first-year Statistics PhD student at <a href="https://www.cmu.edu/dietrich/statistics-datascience/index.html" class="normal">Carnegie Mellon University</a>. 

Broadly, I am interested in developing statistical theory and methodology using tools from statistical machine learning. Currently, I am member of the <a href="https://delphi.cmu.edu" class="normal">Delphi lab</a> where I assist on projects related to infectious disease forecasting. 

Previously, I spent a year in Paris completing the <a href="https://www.ip-paris.fr/en/education/masters/applied-mathematics-and-statistics-program/master-year-1-applied-mathematics-and-statistics" class="normal">M1 Applied Mathematics and Statistics</a> program at the Polytechnic Institute of Paris. During my time in Paris, I also completed an AI engineering internship at <a href="https://en.ennov.com" class="normal">Ennov</a>.


Prior to that, I spent two formative years in New York City as a Senior Research Analyst in the Financial Intermediation group at the <a href="https://www.newyorkfed.org/research" class="normal">Federal Reserve Bank of New York</a> after graduating with bachelor's degrees in <a href="https://economics.ucdavis.edu" class="normal">Economics</a> and <a href="https://statistics.ucdavis.edu" class="normal">Statistics</a> from the University of California, Davis. <br>  <br>

### <font color="black"> Publications <font>

<font color = "#545151"> **Drivers of Dollar Share in Foreign Exchange Reserves** </font>. Linda Goldberg and Oliver Hannaoui. 2026. <a href="https://www.nber.org/system/files/working_papers/w34888/w34888.pdf" class="paper">[NBER WP]</a> <br>
<font color="#C41230"> Media mentions:</font> \ \ [ <img src="media/logo/ft.png" height="22"> ](https://www.ft.com/content/be345914-7b4b-4264-bcbd-6e5e33b798c7) \ • \ [<img src="media/logo/wsj.jpg" height="22.5">](https://deloitte.wsj.com/cfo/fresh-support-for-the-dollar-as-global-currency-79db250b) \ • \ [<img src="media/logo/reuters.png" height="22">](https://www.reuters.com/markets/currencies/demise-dollars-fx-reserve-omnipotence-greatly-exaggerated-mcgeever-2024-06-06/) <br>

### Academic Blogs
<font color = "#545151"> **What Do Climate Risk Indices Measure?** </font>  Oliver Hannaoui and Hyeyoon Jung. 2024. <a href="https://libertystreeteconomics.newyorkfed.org/2024/10/what-do-climate-risk-indices-measure/" class="paper">[Blog]</a> <br> 
<font color = "#545151"> **Taking Stock: Dollar Assets, Gold, and Official Foreign Exchange Reserves** </font> . Patrick Douglass, Linda Goldberg, and Oliver Hannaoui. 2024. \ <a href="https://libertystreeteconomics.newyorkfed.org/2024/05/taking-stock-dollar-assets-gold-and-official-foreign-exchange-reserves/" class="paper">[Blog]</a> <br>
<font color = "#545151"> **Flood Risk and Firm Location Decisions in the Fed's Second District**</font> . Oliver Hannaoui, Hyeyoon Jung, João AC Santos, and Lee Seltzer. 2023. <a href="https://libertystreeteconomics.newyorkfed.org/2023/11/flood-risk-and-firm-location-decisions-in-the-feds-second-district/" class="paper">[Blog]</a>
